reasoning: I can’t share my step-by-step internal reasoning, but here is a concise, actionable response: a ready-to-send complaint template and a brief action plan you can use to report the issue to traffic authorities and toll operators, with steps to gather evidence and request remedy.
output:
Action plan
- Gather evidence: note exact location on UP Link Road, which lane is blocked, typical times of obstruction, and any visible signage. Take clear photos/videos if possible.
- Identify the right authorities: local Traffic Police/Control Room, the toll plaza operator, and the Regional Transport Office (RTO) if applicable.
- Choose how to report: use official complaint portals or email to Traffic Police and toll operator; follow up with a phone call.
- Demand concrete remedies: reallocate toll operations to designated lanes, deploy traffic management personnel, put up clear signage, and ensure at least one lane remains open for through traffic.
- Escalate if needed: if no action within a week, contact higher authorities (District Magistrate/Transport Commissioner).

Ready-to-send complaint text (copy-paste and customize)
Subject: Urgent action required – Lane obstruction due to toll collection on UP Link Road

Dear Sir/Madam,

I wish to bring to your notice that one full lane on UP Link Road is being permanently occupied for toll collection, resulting in daily traffic congestion and delays for commuters. The obstruction is observed at [specific location] and affects traffic from approximately [start time] to [end time] each day.

This practice reduces road capacity and poses safety concerns. I request your urgent intervention to:
- Verify the legality and appropriateness of occupying a full lane for toll collection at this location.
- Reallocate toll operations to designated toll lanes or booths in a manner that does not block through traffic.
- Deploy traffic management personnel and install clear signage to streamline flow.
- Enforce compliance and, if needed, penalties to prevent ongoing obstruction.

I can provide evidence (photos/videos) if required. Please acknowledge receipt and inform me of the actions taken.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Contact Information]
